item.name: INTEGRATOR ENDPOINTS
item.description:
Endpoints for the API-ZSROI to communicate with integrated APP.

The integrator has to implement all these endpoints.

In these requests you need to change the endpoints for your endpoints configurated in [https://developer.zonesoft.org](https://developer.zonesoft.org)
